dimension_spec: 12 in x 6 in x 3 in each; approx 300 x 150 x 75 mm; all faces flat and parallel; ends square; grain running along 12 in length
material_spec: Seasoned solid hardwood only: sheesham/shisham, kikar/acacia, oak, ash, or equivalent dense hardwood
merchant_instruction: Cut 8 solid rectangular support blocks. Leave unfinished/raw. Lightly chamfer sharp edges 3-5 mm if possible, but keep full bearing faces flat.
acceptance_check: Pieces sit flat without rocking; no split ends; no deep knots on bearing faces; no bow/twist; size within about +/-3 mm thickness/width and +/-5 mm length
do_not_accept: Fresh/wet wood, pine/deodar/chir/poplar/softwood, plywood, MDF, chipboard, laminated/glued boards, cracked/split/oily/painted offcuts, rounded branches, uneven wedge-shaped offcuts
notes: For suspension setup cribbing with rated jack stands; not a substitute for rated stands.

dimension_spec: 8 in x 4 in x 3 in starting blank; approx 200 x 100 x 75 mm; taper lengthwise from 75 mm rear height to 20-25 mm nose height; full-width flat bottom
material_spec: Same seasoned solid hardwood batch as SWC-BLOCK-001
merchant_instruction: Cut 4 wheel/axle wedge chocks. If wedges cannot be cut cleanly, supply 4 extra 8 x 4 x 3 in hardwood blocks and the workshop will cut the taper.
acceptance_check: Flat bottom, full 4 in width, wedge does not rock, nose is not feather-thin, no split grain through the taper
do_not_accept: Same rejects as SWC-BLOCK-001; also reject thin feather-edge wedges that will split
notes: Wedges are for chocking/stabilising during suspension work, not primary vehicle support.
